ops.title: Deterministic teardown for TestSupervisorStaleness (CI flake)
ops.description: CI run 29646551059 (commit f1f15ca) failed TestSupervisorStaleness/dead_process_resumes,_killing_the_survivor_first with 'TempDir RemoveAll cleanup: unlinkat ...: directory not empty' — a pre-existing isolation race: the package-global tailers manager (reassigned per-test) and newTestDB connection unwind asynchronously after t.Cleanup(cancel), racing the TempDir removal walk (post-teardown 'sql: database is closed' + prober log spam is the tell). 0/10 local repro incl. -race; needs CI scheduling contention. Fix: drained-completion signaling (WaitGroup/done channel) in orchestrate/supervisor_test.go ~646-760 + orchestrate/store_test.go:28 newTestTailerManager. Unrelated to the daemonkit buildVersion swap on that commit.

ops.text: tailer/prober goroutines signal drained-completion before t.Cleanup(cancel) returns, so t.TempDir RemoveAll never races a straggling writer; 20x -race CI-parallel run green
